Home

This is Modern Medicine

Beacon Hospital provides exceptional patient care with dedicated teams of highly skilled compassionate professionals, enabled by our world leading technologies and equipment.

Departments & Services

Are you suffering from Hip or Knee Osteoarthritis?

We now offer a Rapid Access Hip and Knee Service to patients suffering from Hip or Knee Osteoarthritis. Patients can be seen by a consultant within one week and if surgery is required this can be arranged within the month.

Rapid Access OA Hip & Knee

Beacon Brain Institute

The first stage of Beacon Hospital's €30 million investment in our neuroscience services has officially opened in the form of Ireland's first neurovascular hybrid theatre in a private hospital setting.

Learn more about Beacon Brain Institute

When was the last time you got your heart checked?

Your heart pumps 7,000 litres of blood each day. At Beacon Hospital's Rapid Access Cardiology Clinic we offer a comprehensive heart assessment with fast access and same day results.

Learn More about RACC

Emergency Department

Our team of experts are on hand to offer immediate access to medical assessment and treatment. Our Consultants in Emergency Medicine and their team treat an array of conditions and injuries from sprains, breaks and cardiac complaints to acute medical and surgical emergencies.

Learn More About Our Emergency Department

In each of our department pages, you’ll discover the services available, its consultants, a step-by-step guide and contact details.

Keeping You Safe

All of our departments remain open and we will continue to treat patients with enhanced health and safety standards in place to keep you safe.

Beacon Hospital

Located in Sandyford, Dublin 18, Beacon Hospital is one of the most technologically advanced private hospital’s in all of Europe.

Mark

Home About us

Home

About Us

Beacon Hospital is Ireland’s most technologically advanced hospital.

Located in Sandyford, South Dublin, Beacon Hospital is one of the most technologically advanced private hospital’s in all of Europe.

With 181 inpatients beds 70 day-case beds, 8 operating theatres, 3 cath labs, 4 endoscopy suites, over 1900 healthcare professionals and upwards of 400 consultants, Beacon Hospital operates as a full-service acute hospital. Departments include, but are not limited to; Cancer Care , Cardiology , Cardiothoracic Surgery , Dermatology , Emergency Medicine , Endocrinology , Endoscopy , ENT , General Medicine and Surgery , Intensive Care , Neurology & Neurosurgery , Orthopaedics , Physiotherapy , Paediatric Care ( medical & surgical ), Plastic Surgery , Radiology , Rheumatology , Sports Medicine , Urology , Vascular Services , Women’s Health , Men’s Health and more.

Beacon Hospital treated over 230,000 patients last year across all areas of medicine and surgery.

Click here to read more about Beacon Hospital’s Department’s and Services .

Beacon Hospital’s theatre department has 8 theatres equipped with the latest technology. Our consultant Surgeons and theatre staff are amongst the most highly regarded and experienced in the country. Our theatres perform a range of elective surgeries as well as time sensitive surgeries such as open-heart, brain and cancer surgeries. The most complex of surgeries such as scoliosis correctional surgeries and surgeries to remove deep seated complex brain tumours are performed in our theatres on an almost daily basis.

Our Cancer Centre is the most comprehensive private centre in the whole of Ireland. We offer a fully encompassing cancer service offering all the essential treatments and services such as medical oncology , radiation oncology (with Ireland’s most advanced radiation oncology equipment), surgical oncology, oncology inpatient unit, oncology direct access admissions, pain medicine , palliative care and patient support.

Beacon Centre for Orthopaedics is Ireland’s most complete private Orthopaedic and Sports Medicine service. With access to over 18 specialist Consultants along with our team of Chartered Physiotherapists and Sports Physiologists, our team will have you back on your feet in no time!

Beacon Hospital’s Cardiology and Cardiothoracic Team consistently bring the latest in ground-breaking world-wide techniques to Ireland. In 2020 alone, Beacon Hospital has performed 4 world and Ireland firsts in the area of Heart Health techniques.

Beacon Hospital provides exceptional patient care in an environment where quality, respect, care and compassion are at the centre of all we do. We believe in investing in the best of technology, equipment and expertise in order to provide our patients care unlike anywhere else in the world.

This Is Modern Medicine.

UCD Beacon Hospital Academy

Did you know Beacon Hospital is a teaching hospital affiliated with UCD?

The UCD Beacon Hospital Academy

Beacon Foundation

Beacon Hospital's charitable foundation continues to change the lives of seriously ill patients.

The Beacon Foundation (Charity)

Beacon Hospital Research Institute (BHRI)

Our research institute is involved in many clinical research projects and trials.

Beacon Hospital Research Institute

Contact

Unable to find the information you are looking for? Use our contact form to request any additional information which you require about Beacon Hospital.

General Contacts

Call our front desk

01 293 6600

These queries will be answered during regular office hours (ie. not during evenings, weekends or Bank Holidays). For urgent medical or appointment related enquiries (including cancellations) please telephone the Hospital Switch at any time.

Please do NOT email any personal or sensitive medical information to this address. Instead please telephone the Hospital Switch for assistance.

If you have a job or career-related enquiry, please use the email address: [email protected] , which is accessed by Human Resources. Thank you for your interest.

Sign Up for Our Seasonal Newsletter!

Beacon Hospital’s Seasonal Newsletter covers the latest news and current information, including Consultants and services available at Beacon Hospital.

In addition to this, there will be pieces from our consultants and team with tips for health and well-being, and useful advice for the whole family.

Sign Up Now!
